steps.title: Warm-up Reading
steps.description: Read yesterday's revision notes for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Today's Topic: Revision of Days 1-9
steps.description: Read through all lesson sections on Revision of Days 1-9.

steps.title: Vocabulary Practice
steps.description: Learn and repeat today's new vocabulary words aloud.

steps.title: Practice Questions
steps.description: Solve today's practice questions on Revision of Days 1-9.

steps.title: Speaking Drill
steps.description: Speak today's example sentences aloud 3 times each.
